case_title: MCMURDO, LAURA T., TRUSTEE OF THE LAURA T. MCMURDO et al vs. ALBERT, JESSIE MAE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCMURDO, LAURA T., TRUSTEE OF THE LAURA T. MCMURDOREVOCABLE LIVING TRUST DATED NOVEMBER 6, 1985 CLAYMAN, STUART KAPLAN, PAUL KAPLA, RITA S.,TRUSTEES UA...DID 7-21-83 FBO BARTEL, GERSON- CO-TRUSTEES OF THE GERSON BARTEL, BELENE L., CO-TRUSTEES OF THE GERSON BARTEL, HELENE L.,TRUST DTD 5-7-81 DOOLING, DELIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALBERT, JESSIE MAE DOES ONE THROUGH TWENTY, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS GRANTED - 6 - QUIDACHAY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCMURDO, LAURA T., TRUSTEE OF THE LAURA T. MCMURDOREVOCABLE LIVING TRUST DATED NOVEMBER 6, 1985
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ALBERT, JESSIE MAE

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCMURDO, LAURA T., TRUSTEE OF THE LAURA T. MCMURDOREVOCABLE LIVING TRUST DATED NOVEMBER 6, 1985 COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-19-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

#5 JDG WICK. CSR BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK G. VAN HEST. 9:40 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL JOHN VLAHOS. DEFT PRESENT WITH COUNSEL ELAINE M. O'NEIL. A STIP FOR JUDGMENT READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PLTF TO HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 370 HARKNESS AVE, S.F. WRIT STAYED TILL NOV 3, 1993. PLTF WAIVES BACKRENT. IF DEFT PAYS $1,000.00 ON OR BEFORE NOV 1, 1993 LOCK OUT STAYED TILL 12/1/93; IF DEFT PAYS ANOTHER $1,695.00 ON OR BEFORE 12/1/93 ADD'L STAY TILL 1/1/94. DEFT HAS AN OPTION TO BUY THE PROPERTY AND PLTF WILL NOT SELL PROPERTY TO A 3RD PARTY PRIOR TO 1/1/94. DEFT AGREED NOT TO FILE AN ACTION TO SET ASIDE THE FORECLOSURE SALE. PLTF TO PREPARE STIP JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALBERT, JESSIE MAE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 370 HARKNESS AVE, S.F, STAYED TO NOV 3,1993;IF DEFT PAYS $1,000.00 ON NOV 1, 1993 STAYED TILL DEC 1, 1993;IF DEFT PAYS ADD'L $1,695.00 ON DEC 1, 1993 STAYED TILL 1/1/94. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
